title: Loop-A built-in-primary proposals fail M3 audit on a primary_params key-name contract gap
source: hackathon-pm M3 audit batch 2026-05-29: cusum/bollinger Loop-A proposals crash _select_primary with KeyError.
why: The Loop-A hypothesizer is given available_primaries as NAMES only, not their param schemas, so it emits primary_params with guessed keys (e.g. cusum: threshold_atr_mult / threshold_sigma; pipeline _select_primary expects threshold_atr). scripts/run_xau_d1.py::_select_primary then raises KeyError and the M3 audit subprocess exits nonzero BEFORE producing a Sharpe verdict. Built-in non-custom Loop-A proposals are therefore uncauditable as-emitted. Verified: after manual param normalization (threshold_atr added), the same proposal audits to completion -> audit_class=NO_FIRE/falsified. So the conclusion (0 survivors) holds, but the audit telemetry was confounded by this contract gap for built-in primaries.
value_rationale: Medium: blocks clean automated M3 audit of built-in-primary Loop-A proposals (the majority of non-custom candidates). Custom primaries are unaffected (they ship their own signal()).
scope: Option A: give the hypothesizer the exact param schema per built-in primary in the stage_propose payload (available_primaries -> {name: param_schema}).

Option B: add a param-name normalization/alias layer in phase5.run_proposal (or _select_primary) mapping common synonyms (threshold_atr_mult/threshold_sigma -> threshold_atr; window/num_std -> period/k_stdev) before dispatch.
Add a schema-validation step in stage_review that rejects primary_params not matching the primary contract, with a feedback retry (like the anti-circularity lint).
recommendation: Option A (schema in payload) is the firewall-clean, durable fix; Option B is a quick unblock.

history.reason: logged from M3 audit batch param-contract finding
feat(loop-a): B0040 custom-primary materialization->audit path demonstrated; B0085 normalizer; B0086 logged

A+B+validate: pipeline/primary_contracts.py single-source contract; normalize at build_transient_config (fail-fast); schema in hypothesizer payload (4 sites) + stage_review guard; agent doc updated. 20 new tests, full suite green.
